entries.description: Read spec, project-guidance, lessons (L-069-2/L-065-1/L-070-1), verification.md, path-aware-critique.md, verification.py, test_verification_framing.py, classify_framing_strength.

Added materiality "so what?" gate + anti-nitpick (semantic-equivalence, pytest-vs-python-m-pytest example) + severity anchor (Major=merge decision) + plausible-path-to-harm escalation + non-blocking NITS section to verification.md, additively; strong-framing phrases/placeholders/verdict tokens preserved.
Mirrored the same materiality + anti-nitpick + severity-anchoring + NITS layer into path-aware-critique.md, fitting its VERDICT/Findings grammar (L-065-1).

Extended test_verification_framing.py: 6 materiality phrases pinned in BOTH templates + classify_framing_strength still ADVERSARIAL for both (additivity/dual-surface-equality proof). Suite 2093 passed/5 skipped (was 2079/5; +14).

Cross-provider verification (gpt-5-4, routed_gate REQUIRED via --high-blast+--contract-uncovered): 11 rounds. Every substantive finding adopted (R2 prompt_body_of pull pin; R3-R5 full-clause+pytest-contrast pins; R6 parser-compat+ordered-triad+NITS-compat-gap; R7 real NITS/Minor grammar contradiction fixed in both templates; R8 parser-test honesty; R9 section-anchored triad false-pass; R10 section-anchored NITS-heading pin). Recurring R3-R11 over-restraint theme adjudicated NON-BLOCKING per the materiality bar. Suite 2126/5. Adjudicated verdict VERIFIED.

Wrote disposition.json (VERIFIED, status completed). Routed S2 next-orchestrator rec = claude/sonnet-4-6/medium. Saved 11 raw verification rounds + harness. Progress keys: materiality-push-template, materiality-pull-template, framing-pins-green, s1-verified all met.

Read spec S2, project-guidance, lessons (L-069-2/L-065-1/L-070-1/L-066-1), S1 deliverables (verification.md, path-aware-critique.md), verification.py (build_verification_prompt/parse_verification_response), test_verification_framing.py, ai-led-session-workflow.md Step 6 + Mode B disposition enum, dual_surface_verify.classify_framing_strength.

Operator-requested cross-provider consult on binary-vs-three-state verdict grammar (decision-time consensus). Routed brief to gpt-5-4 + gemini-pro independently, then synthesized via fresh opus. UNANIMOUS = BINARY (matches spec default + operator lean). Refinement adopted: make is_blocking_verdict a first-class, fully-tested, DOCUMENTED contract artifact; doc note that bare VERIFIED token is insufficient to infer non-blocking. Raw: s2-grammar-consult-{gpt,gemini,claude-synthesis}.md.

Added severity-anchored blocking logic to verification.py: is_blocking_verdict(verdict,issues) (>=1 Critical/Major OR unknown-severity in non-VERIFIED -> blocking; Minor-only/nits-only -> non-blocking; ISSUES_FOUND-no-issues -> blocking, anti-laundering) + classify_blocking (BlockingClassification split+reason) + reconcile_issue_ledger/LedgerReconciliation (stable-id RESOLVED/UNRESOLVED + resurrection flag). Exported via __init__. CONTRACT NOTE documented: bare verdict token insufficient, callers MUST consult predicate (binary grammar preserved, blocking-ness first-class). Also fixed a real load-bearing parse_verification_response bug: ISSUES-FOUND header self-match (spurious severity-less finding) + severity regex could not read "**Severity:** Minor" (colon-before-asterisks) -> Minor read as unknown -> blocking = the churn this set kills. parse_verification_response (verdict,issues) contract preserved.

Encoded re-verify loop discipline in ai-led-session-workflow.md: new Step-6 subsection "Materiality and the re-verify loop discipline (Set 071)" (severity-anchored blocking via is_blocking_verdict not bare token; Minor-only=effectively VERIFIED opens no round; anti-laundering; cross-round issue ledger no-resurrection-under-new-wording; 1-2/3+ bound unchanged, only narrows round-justifying findings; cites L-069-2). Wired Step-7 ISSUES_FOUND branch + max-2-retries item + Mode-B bounded-round item to it (L-065-1: all echoes in one pass).

tests/test_blocking_classifier.py (new): is_blocking_verdict matrix (VERIFIED/Critical/Major/Minor-only/mixed/unknown/empty/case-insensitive), classify_blocking partition, the VERBATIM pytest-vs-python-m-pytest-v churn (3 rounds r2/r3/r4 end-to-end through parse_verification_response -> Minor-only -> NON-blocking), real-Major-still-blocks-through-parser, reconcile_issue_ledger (first-round/resolve/resurrection/dedupe/empty-round). Operator grammar decision = BINARY (unanimous consult). Full suite 2150 passed/5 skipped (was 2126/5; +24). S1 framing pins all green (additive).

Cross-provider verification (gpt-5-4, routed_gate REQUIRED: blast-radius/multi-module/breadth): 6 rounds. R1 Major REAL (incomplete header class-fix: underscored ISSUES_FOUND + VERDICT: prefix; L-069-1) ADOPTED. R2 Major FALSE-POSITIVE (claimed parser must learn path-aware Findings grammar; architecturally wrong - pull uses structured pull_verifier.Finding) ADJUDICATED + hardened w/ surface-agnostic test. R3 Major REAL (is_blocking_verdict short-circuited on token vs doc) ADOPTED: made severity-DERIVED + parse_nits. R4 Major REAL (end-to-end anti-laundering) ADOPTED then over-reached. R5 Major x2: Issue1 = R4 substring-scan REINTRODUCED false-positive churn -> REVERTED to token-trust; Issue2 = no programmatic consumer -> WIRED blocking/nits onto VerificationResult. R6 Major = genuine DESIGN SPLIT (token-trust vs severity-derivation, conflicting w/ R5) ESCALATED to operator per 3+-human rule -> operator chose TRUST VERIFIED token (record_adjudication: genuine-split/accept-dismissal). Adjudicated verdict VERIFIED. Suite 2165/5. Raw rounds s2-verification[-round-N].md.

Wrote disposition.json (VERIFIED adjudicated, status completed). Routed S3 next-orchestrator rec = claude/opus-4-8/medium (s2-next-orchestrator.md, gemini-pro; irreversible PyPI release + durable guidance favor tier-3 + continuity, medium effort for runbook+synthesis). Progress keys met: blocking-classifier, loop-discipline-doc, churn-regression-fixture, s2-verified. Lessons cited: L-069-2/L-069-1/L-065-1/L-070-1/L-066-1/L-064-10.

S3 FINAL: registered session 3; read S1-S2 deliverables + guidance. Wrote verification-surface-strategy.md sec 7 (materiality gate + Minor-non-blocking loop discipline), pull-verifier.md Set-071 section, lesson L-071-1 (cites L-069-2/L-065-1/L-070-1), set-level change-log.md. Refreshed guidance-overhead headers.

Bumped ai_router 0.24.0->0.25.0 (__init__.py + pyproject.toml); added CHANGELOG [0.25.0] entry AND backfilled the missing [0.24.0] entry (Set 070 bumped+tagged v0.24.0 but never wrote the package changelog section). RELEASE STAGED NOT PUBLISHED per operator directive (concurrent VS Code process must not be disrupted) -- no tag pushed, no publish.

Routed next-SESSION-SET recommendation (route analysis, gemini-pro -> s3-next-session-set.md): rec set-072-consolidate-apparatus (canonical repo) = harden the L-069-1 deferred sibling-reader residual + instrument the materiality gate effect on re-verify-round count/false-positive rate; alts harden-readers / field-pilot-enablement.

Cross-provider session verification (routed_gate REQUIRED). 7 rounds. R1-R3 gpt-5-4 META-CONFUSION (treated the work-product bundle as if it should itself be a verdict) -> reframed evidence as a clean work-product summary + switched verifier to gemini-pro. R4 REAL Major (push-surface anti-laundering overclaim: docs said is_blocking_verdict blocks Major regardless-of-token without the push-parser-trusts-VERIFIED-token caveat) -> fixed all 6 echoes (L-065-1). R5 REAL Major (loop-scope inconsistency: classifier surface-agnostic push+pull vs loop-discipline routed-api+Mode-B) -> made strategy 7.1.3 + L-071-1 precise. R6 FALSE POSITIVE (template_text seam location) -> VERIFIED in code (seam IS in pull_critique.py; classify_framing_strength in dual_surface_verify.py calls it) -> clarified phrasing. R7 FALSE POSITIVE (claimed exports absent from __init__.py) -> VERIFIED all 6 symbols importable from ai_router (S2 commit 2132bfe; the S3 diff only shows the version bump, L-069/L-064-9 diff-omits-committed-context) -> adjudicated + 1 non-blocking NIT noted. Verdict VERIFIED (real Majors R4/R5 fixed; R6/R7 code-verified false positives adjudicated; this loop itself dogfooded the set discipline: real Majors justified rounds, false positives adjudicated against code ground truth, no churn).
